name: Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub clam shells well to remove all sand.
2. Lay clams in the bottom of a large kettle and cover with boiling water. Cover the kettle and steam for about 15 minutes.
3. Open clams, saving all liquor. Chop clams.
4. Fry pork for 5 minutes.
5. Add potatoes, onions, and clam liquor to the pot and cook for 15 minutes.
6. Add chopped clams and boil for 20 minutes.
7. Melt butter, add flour and blend. Stir in milk and cook for about 10 minutes.
8. Add salt and pepper. Combine both mixtures and serve immediately.
